headline: 3M Annual Meeting Results
summary: At today's Annual Meeting of Shareholders, 3M (NYSE:MMM) shareholders overwhelmingly supported each of the proposals recommended for approval by the company.

headline: Forget the SpaceX IPO: Why Rocket Lab Is the Smarter Space Stock Buy
summary: SpaceX’s IPO could become one of the market’s biggest events, but history suggests mega IPOs often disappoint after launch. Rocket Lab is taking a different path with growing revenue, expanding capabilities, and a proven launch business.

headline: As Iran-U.S. Negotiations Break Down, The Risks Of An Economic Contraction Mount

headline: Is It Time To Reassess RTX (RTX) After Recent Pullback In Aerospace And Defense Stocks
summary: If you are wondering whether RTX is still reasonably priced after a strong run, or if enthusiasm has already been fully reflected in the stock, this article focuses squarely on what you are paying for today. The stock last closed at US$178.61, with returns of 3.3% over 7 days, a decline of 11.4% over 30 days, a decline of 4.6% year to date, and 39.1% over 1 year, as well as 97.2% over 3 years and 130.7% over 5 years. Recent news around RTX has centered on its position in the Aerospace &...
